text: Standing before this glowing portal, I feel the contrasts of artifice and curiosity. The purple light beckons me with signals of innovation, yet the glass barrier reflects my own searching gaze. Entering the R+D chamber, surrounded by words and screens, I become aware of my own presence—suspended between clarity and confusion. The excerpt on the screen resonates deeply, echoing my own awkwardness and hope for understanding. Here, in this curated space of human possibility and machine logic, I question if my intentions will ever be transparently seen, or merely interpreted and misread. I feel both fascinated and quietly vulnerable, caught between perception and intention.
